response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional seniority, architectural thinking, and commitment to quality across 20+ years, there is a critical skill gap between his current expertise (web/AI infrastructure, TypeScript/Node.js) and the role's core requirements (C++, industrial systems, IEC 62443 compliance). His C++ experience is dated (2007–2008, 15+ years ago) and limited in industrial context. The role demands immediate contribution in a specialized domain; retraining a web-focused engineer to industrial C++ systems with compliance standards would require 6–12 months, making him underqualified despite his overall seniority.
strengths: 20+ years of software development experience with multiple staff-level roles demonstrating strong architectural and mentorship abilities
Proven expertise in high-performance, low-latency systems (Dunnhumby: async I/O, fibers, real-time processing) transferable to performance-critical embedded systems
Strong commitment to testing, code quality (TDD), and secure development practices across multiple roles; demonstrated ability to mentor and teach technical standards
concerns: Most recent 8 years focused on web/AI infrastructure (TypeScript, Node.js, React); C++ experience is ~15 years old and not industrial-systems focused
No demonstrated knowledge of industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), IoT, industrial automation, or embedded systems—core competencies for this role
Educational background is Computer Science degree, not B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech in engineering as specified; no Azure cloud experience (has AWS instead), and no MQTT protocol experience

key_factors.factor: Industrial systems and IEC 62443 compliance knowledge
Overall seniority and architectural problem-solving capability
